mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_user_favorite WHERE visitor_id = #{visitorId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.visitor_id, f.article_id, f.created_at, a.title AS article_title, a.slug AS article_slug, a.excerpt AS article_excerpt FROM t_user_favorite f INNER JOIN t_article a ON f.article_id = a.id WHERE f.visitor_id = #{visitorId} AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user_favorite f INNER JOIN t_article a ON f.article_id = a.id WHERE f.visitor_id = #{visitorId} AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED'
